ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF O'CONNELL, MARIANNE

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONERS TOM O'CONNELL AND MARIANNE O'CONNELL'S RENEWED MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PRESENTED AT THE HEARING. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
ORDER OF EXAMINATION JUN-05-2008 DISCHARGED AS TO RICK MOZER; JUDGMENT DEBTOR SWORN AND EXAMINED

NOTICE OF MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER O'CONNELL, TOM O'CONNELL, MARIANNE HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONERS TOM O'CONNELL, MARIANNE O'CONNELL'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. "I CAUSED" TO BE MAILED DOES NOT SHOW PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE OF SERVICE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
